subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The tracings of thy musk-laden pen were reviewed, and the utmost effusion of the love of God from Paran was evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اثر کلک مشکین ملاحظه گردید و نهایت فوران محبت الله از فاران
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @martyrs and martyrdom
